text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Fukuryu Stakes. Copano Rickey
has purposefully skipped out on running in the
Classic Triple Crown race, the Satsuki Sho, to be
here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon entering the paddock, Copano Rickey
notices the lackluster qi radiating from the
spectators in the racecourse. Dirt racing really
struggles to draw much attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She is almost convinced to switch over to turf and
run in the Derby, but holds off on making any
decision until she's run her race.
